title: Wings Pack
description: A collection of mods that greatly enhance the Vanilla experience of Minecraft. The gameplay loop is exactly the same, no new ores or equipments are added.
body:
Official modpack for the Wings Server.  
A collection of mods that greatly enhance the Vanilla experience of Minecraft. The gameplay loop is exactly the same, no new ores or equipments are added.  
It adds many small QOL features and changes to Minecraft, as well as many graphicak enhancements  and optimization Mods for the player.  
Some small Vanilla-like recipes and mobs are added, you can see on the list below.  
  
# What it includes
## Mods
### Changes
- [3D Skin Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers)
- [Auto HUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/autohud)
- [Better Days](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterdays)
- [Better Pind Display](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-ping-display-fabric)
- [Better Third Person](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-third-person)
- [Bridging Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/bridging-mod)
- [Cave Dust](https://modrinth.com/mod/cave-dust)
- [Charmonium](https://modrinth.com/mod/charmonium)
- [Chest Tracker](https://modrinth.com/mod/chest-tracker)
- [Debugify](https://modrinth.com/mod/debugify)
- [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons)
- [Dynamic Crosshair](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamiccrosshair)
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin)
- [Falling Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingleaves)
- [First-Person Model](https://modrinth.com/mod/first-person-model)
- [Immersive UI](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-ui)
- [Immersive:Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-tooltip)
- [Inventory Profiles Next](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-profiles-next)
- [NoRecipeBook](https://modrinth.com/mod/norecipebook-fabric)
- [Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations)
- [Pickup Notifications](https://modrinth.com/mod/pickup-notifications)
- [Ping Wheel](https://modrinth.com/mod/ping-wheel)
- [https://modrinth.com/mod/rei
- [Roughly Enough Items (REI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei)
- [Serene Seasons](https://modrinth.com/mod/serene-seasons)
- [Sound Physics](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered)
- [Sounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound)
- [This Rocks!](https://modrinth.com/mod/this-rocks)
- [Visual Workbench](https://modrinth.com/mod/visual-workbench)
- [Visuality](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality)

- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)
- [Faster Random](https://modrinth.com/mod/faster-random)

- [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast)
- [Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton)
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)
- [ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix)
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
- [StutterFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/stutterfix)
  
### Additions
- [Friends & Foes](https://modrinth.com/mod/friends-and-foes)
- [Handcrafted](https://modrinth.com/mod/handcrafted)

- [Fancy Crops](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fancy-crops)
- [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)

## Shaderpack
- [Bliss Shader](https://github.com/X0nk/Bliss-Shader)

- [Cicada](https://modrinth.com/mod/cicada)

- [GlitchCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/glitchcore)
- [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium)
- [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)
- [Kaleido](https://modrinth.com/mod/kaleido)
- [M.R.U](https://modrinth.com/mod/mru)
- [Text Placeholder API](https://modrinth.com/mod/placeholder-api)
- [YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)
- [[EMF] Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)
- [[ETF] Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)
- [LibIPN](https://modrinth.com/mod/libipn)
- [pv-addon-sculk](https://modrinth.com/plugin/pv-addon-sculk)
- [pv-addon-soundphysics](https://modrinth.com/mod/pv-addon-soundphysics)

Minecraft 1.21 and Fabric 1.16 required.
